domain_descriptions: Ankyrin Repeat and Cyclin-Dependent Kinase Inhibitor
structural_features: Ankyrin Repeat and Cyclin-Dependent Kinase Inhibitor
conserved_regions: Ankyrin Repeat and Cyclin-Dependent Kinase Inhibitor
ciliary_role: MST1/2 has a noncanonical function: regulation of microtubule stability/dy mics. Loss of MST1/2 or its target(s) NDR1/2 destabilizes kinetochore-microtubule attachment during mitosis ( 20171103 ,  19327996). MST1/2 binds and phosphorylates AURKA, leading to dissociation of the AURKA/HDAC6 cilia-disassembly complex, and MST1/2-SAV1 associates with the NPHP transition-zone complex, promoting ciliary localization of multiple ciliary cargoes ( 25367221).

ai_summary.basic_summary: CDKN2B is a ciliary gene encoding cyclin dependent kinase inhibitor 2b [source:hgnc symbol;acc:hgnc:1788]
